risk\n      gamma = 0.5  # risk aversion\n      objective = cp.Maximize(mu @ w - gamma * cp.quad_form(w, Sigma))\n\n      # Define constraints\n      constraints = [cp.sum(w) == 1, w >= 0]\n\n      # Solve\n      prob = cp.Problem(objective, constraints)\n      prob.solve()\n      print(f\"Optimal weights: {w.value}\")\n      print(f\"Expected return: {mu @ w.value:.4f}\")\n\n  rcwa:\n    description: \"RCWA/S4 - u[1])\n          du[2] = u[1] * (ρ - u[3]) - u[2]\n          du[3] = u[1] * u[2] - β * u[3]\n      end\n\n      # Initial conditions and parameters\n      u0 = [1.0, 0.0, 0.0]\n      p = (10.0, 28.0, 8/3)\n      tspan = (0.0, 100.0)\n\n      # Solve the ODE\n      prob = ODEProblem(lorenz!, u0, tspan, p)\n      sol = solve(prob)\n\n      # Plot the solution\n      plot(sol, idxs=(1, 2, 3), title=\"Lorenz Attractor\")\n\n  paraview:\n    description: \"ParaView -
